name: OpenCode — Run Session (single prompt)
description: Send one prompt to an OpenCode backend via MoJo's external_agent hub. Creates a new session, sends the message, returns the response. For multi-turn work, use opencode_session_chat instead. Requires coding-agent-mcp-tool to be running.

MOJO_BASE_URL.description: MoJo MCP HTTP base URL (use http://localhost:8000 for local)

prompt.description: The task to send to OpenCode

working_dir.description: Absolute path to the working directory (default: $HOME)
